message.content:
Create the Compose theme files for CourtAssistant Android app with Song-style aesthetics (宋氏美学).

1. Create file C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\ui\theme\Theme.kt:
```kotlin
package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color

// 宋氏美学配色 - 素雅中式风格
val Ivory = Color(0xFFFFF8F0)          // 米白底色
val WarmWhite = Color(0xFFFFFDF5)      // 暖白
val InkBlack = Color(0xFF2C2C2C)       // 墨色文字
val CharcoalGray = Color(0xFF4A4A4A)   // 深灰
val CinnabarRed = Color(0xFFC04851)    // 朱红点缀
val LightCinnabar = Color(0xFFE8939A)  // 浅朱红
val MistGray = Color(0xFFE8E4DF)       // 雾灰分割线
val ParchmentBg = Color(0xFFF5F0E8)    // 羊皮纸背景
val JadeGreen = Color(0xFF5B8C5A)      // 玉绿（成功色）
val AmberGold = Color(0xFFD4A843)      // 琥珀金

private val CourtColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    primary = CinnabarRed,
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    primaryContainer = LightCinnabar.copy(alpha = 0.3f),
    onPrimaryContainer = CinnabarRed,
    secondary = CharcoalGray,
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    background = Ivory,
    onBackground = InkBlack,
    surface = WarmWhite,
    onSurface = InkBlack,
    surfaceVariant = ParchmentBg,
    onSurfaceVariant = CharcoalGray,
    outline = MistGray,
    tertiary = JadeGreen,
    tertiaryContainer = AmberGold
)

@Composable
fun CourtAssistantTheme(content: @Composable () -> Unit) {
    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = CourtColorScheme,
        typography = CourtTypography,
        content = content
    )
}
```

2. Create file C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\ui\theme\Type.kt:
```kotlin
package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.Typography
import androidx.compose.ui.text.TextStyle
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontFamily
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp

val CourtTypography = Typography(
    headlineLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
        fontSize = 28.sp,
        letterSpacing = 2.sp
    ),
    headlineMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
        fontSize = 22.sp,
        letterSpacing = 1.sp
    ),
    titleLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 18.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    titleMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 15.sp
    ),
    bodyLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 15.sp,
        lineHeight = 24.sp
    ),
    bodyMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 13.sp,
        lineHeight = 20.sp
    ),
    labelLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 13.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    labelSmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 11.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    )
)
```

Create all necessary directories first.

content.text: Creating the directory structure and both theme files.
Now I'll create both theme files.

input.command:
cat > "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\ui\theme\Theme.kt" << 'KOTLIN_EOF'
package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.*

// 宋氏美学配色 - 素雅中式风格

val CinnabarRed = Color(0xFFC04851)    // 朱红点缀
val LightCinnabar = Color(0xFFE8939A)  // 浅朱红
val MistGray = Color(0xFFE8E4DF)       // 雾灰分割线
val ParchmentBg = Color(0xFFF5F0E8)    // 羊皮纸背景

val AmberGold = Color(0xFFD4A843)      // 琥珀金

private val CourtColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    primary = CinnabarRed,
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    primaryContainer = LightCinnabar.copy(alpha = 0.3f),
    onPrimaryContainer = CinnabarRed,
    secondary = CharcoalGray,
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    background = Ivory,
    onBackground = InkBlack,
    surface = WarmWhite,
    onSurface = InkBlack,
    surfaceVariant = ParchmentBg,
    onSurfaceVariant = CharcoalGray,
    outline = MistGray,
    tertiary = JadeGreen,
    tertiaryContainer = AmberGold
)

@Composable
fun CourtAssistantTheme(content: @Composable () -> Unit) {
    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = CourtColorScheme,
        typography = CourtTypography,
        content = content
    )
}
KOTLIN_EOF

input.description: Create Type.kt with Serif typography for Song-style aesthetics

content.text: Let me verify both files were created correctly.

content.content:
package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.Typography
import androidx.compose.ui.text.TextStyle
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontFamily
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp

val CourtTypography = Typography(
    headlineLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
        fontSize = 28.sp,
        letterSpacing = 2.sp
    ),
    headlineMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
        fontSize = 22.sp,
        letterSpacing = 1.sp
    ),
    titleLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 18.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    titleMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 15.sp
    ),
    bodyLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 15.sp,
        lineHeight = 24.sp
    ),
    bodyMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 13.sp,
        lineHeight = 20.sp
    ),
    labelLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 13.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    labelSmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 11.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    )
)

package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color

// 宋氏美学配色 - 素雅中式风格
val Ivory = Color(0xFFFFF8F0)          // 米白底色
val WarmWhite = Color(0xFFFFFDF5)      // 暖白
val InkBlack = Color(0xFF2C2C2C)       // 墨色文字
val CharcoalGray = Color(0xFF4A4A4A)   // 深灰
val CinnabarRed = Color(0xFFC04851)    // 朱红点缀
val LightCinnabar = Color(0xFFE8939A)  // 浅朱红
val MistGray = Color(0xFFE8E4DF)       // 雾灰分割线
val ParchmentBg = Color(0xFFF5F0E8)    // 羊皮纸背景
val JadeGreen = Color(0xFF5B8C5A)      // 玉绿（成功色）
val AmberGold = Color(0xFFD4A843)      // 琥珀金

private val CourtColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    primary = CinnabarRed,
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    primaryContainer = LightCinnabar.copy(alpha = 0.3f),
    onPrimaryContainer = CinnabarRed,
    secondary = CharcoalGray,
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    background = Ivory,
    onBackground = InkBlack,
    surface = WarmWhite,
    onSurface = InkBlack,
    surfaceVariant = ParchmentBg,
    onSurfaceVariant = CharcoalGray,
    outline = MistGray,
    tertiary = JadeGreen,
    tertiaryContainer = AmberGold
)

@Composable
fun CourtAssistantTheme(content: @Composable () -> Unit) {
    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = CourtColorScheme,
        typography = CourtTypography,
        content = content
    )
}

content.text:
Both files have been created and verified successfully. Here is a summary of what was done:

**Files created:**

1. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\ui\theme\Theme.kt`
   - Defines the Song-style color palette (Ivory, CinnabarRed, InkBlack, JadeGreen, AmberGold, etc.)
   - Configures a Material3 `lightColorScheme` using those colors
   - Provides the `CourtAssistantTheme` composable that applies the color scheme and typography

2. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\ui\theme\Type.kt`
   - Defines `CourtTypography` using `FontFamily.Serif` throughout for a classical Chinese aesthetic
   - Covers all key text styles: headlineLarge/Medium, titleLarge/Medium, bodyLarge/Medium, labelLarge/Small
   - Uses wider letter spacing on headlines to evoke traditional calligraphic layout

The theme is ready to use. Wrap your app content with `CourtAssistantTheme { ... }` in your `MainActivity` to apply it.
